title: Morgan Kaufmann's Information Security Triad (CIA Triad) in Cloud Context
description: A visual representation of the core information security principles (Confidentiality, Integrity, Availability) as defined by Morgan Kaufmann publications, applied specifically to cloud computing environments.
relationships: Confidentiality is ensured by encryption and access controls
Integrity is maintained via hashing and audit logs
Availability is provided through redundancy and SLAs
The Cloud Provider is responsible for implementing security controls
The Cloud Consumer is responsible for configuring and using services securely
